description: LRU cache eviction modelled on the cachetools library: empty/contains/get/put/lruKey over a recency-ordered key list (MRU first), with recency (put/get move-to-front) and minimality (full-capacity put evicts exactly the LRU/last key) specs anchored on List.head?, List.getLast?, and List.contains. Scope: this is an eviction-POLICY model of `cachetools.LRUCache` — KEYS only (values are erased), with pure state-threading (each op returns a new cache) instead of Python's in-place mutation. `lruKey` is a derived observer exposing the current eviction victim (the LRU/last key); it is not Python's `popitem` (it neither removes the key nor returns a value). The spec_applyOps_* obligations characterize whole-trace behaviour over an arbitrary sequence of puts (capacity/Nodup global invariants, the closed-form lruModel contents formula, MRU-head, and membership/eviction over sequences), requiring induction over the operation sequence. The spec_applyMixed_* obligations go further: they replay an interleaved get+put trace (Op = get|put, applyMixed, the keyStep/keyModel closed form) so that get-reordering and put-eviction must both be threaded through a single trace induction (keystone spec_applyMixed_contents, plus mixed capacity/size/Nodup invariants, membership, last-put-MRU, and a get-only-suffix set-preservation law). The put-only stack-distance/reuse guarantee (spec_reuse_no_evict), the net eviction count (spec_total_evictions = max(0, #distinct - cap)), and the dup-free-prefix closure (spec_lruModel_nodup_prefix) pin the deep combinatorial structure of the dedupKeepFirst contents formula. The deepest tier are the generalize-then-induct obligations whose clean end-statements HIDE the load-bearing invariant: spec_cap_monotone_order_prefix (the cap-run order is a prefix of the cap+1-run order, proved only by carrying the exact truncation coupling order(cap)=take cap (order(cap+1)) through the fold), spec_eviction_trace_prefix_monotone (a prefix's eviction log is a prefix of the longer trace's, proved via an accumulator frame-independence law discovered by generalizing over the carried log), spec_eviction_count_cap_monotone (eviction-EVENT count is monotone in capacity for cap>0, proved by a lockstep two-run coupling carrying the order coupling plus a running count inequality — not the net-eviction closed form), and spec_evicted_persists (a dropped key stays dropped under puts of other keys, proved by propagating the absence invariant through the suffix fold). A further tier of forgetting/saturation, exact-size, and op-equivalence obligations whose clean statements again hide the load-bearing invariant: spec_suffix_saturates (a suffix introducing ≥ cap distinct keys makes the cache FORGET its entire prefix — order(xs++ys)=order(ys) — proved via a GENERALIZED contents formula over an arbitrary within-cap Nodup start cache plus a dedupKeepFirst prefix-append absorption fact, neither of which is the empty-start contents keystone), spec_final_size_eq (exact survivor count = min cap #distinct), spec_get_only_from_empty_noop (a get-only trace from empty is the whole-STATE identity, proved by carrying the stays-empty invariant through the fold), spec_evicted_were_put (eviction provenance: every logged victim was put, via evRun_couple plus a model-side membership-frame on evStep's log), spec_get_after_put_noop (re-getting a just-put key is a whole-state no-op at every capacity, via the put-output k::tl structure), and spec_put_eq_get_present (put = get on a present within-cap key, since both move-to-front and the Nodup length bound rules out a put-eviction). A final tier of positional / frame / recency-anchor obligations pins structure the contents formulas leave implicit: spec_survivor_index (a surviving key sits at exactly its reuse-distance position in the recency order — dropping the more-recently-reused keys lands on it), spec_mru_iff_reuse_distance_zero (the head of the order is a key iff that key was put with zero intervening distinct reuse), and spec_get_absent_suffix_noop (a read-only suffix touching only currently-absent keys is a whole-STATE identity, strictly beyond the get-only membership-preservation law).
